title: Sabo Reveals the Truth of the Levely
description: On pages 14–14, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Celestial Dragons, Kizaru, Sabo as World events shift toward Cross Guild, Sabo’s account of the Levely, Cobra’s death, Imu, the Five Elders, and the Revolutionary Army’s next move.
scene: World events shift toward Cross Guild, Sabo’s account of the Levely, Cobra’s death, Imu, the Five Elders, and the Revolutionary Army’s next move.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He might've been programmed to return to Mariejois as a contingency...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sorry about that, we let everyone's work go to waste...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't worry, I know you two are taking it the hardest.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...$50, SABO... You don't want the captains hearingk what you've got to Essay?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yeah, just hearing it might put your life at risk.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There was some major trouble at the reverie.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll tell you all about what really happened...

summary: This part advances the Cross Guild and Reverie Truth through 10 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
